events.text: Goal!  Croatia 0, Denmark 1. Zanka (Denmark) left footed shot from the left side of the six yard box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Thomas Delaney.
Goal!  Croatia 1, Denmark 1. Mario Mandzukic (Croatia) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner.
Zanka (Denmark) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Penalty saved. Luka Modric (Croatia)  right footed shot saved  in the bottom right corner.
